title: Medical Skills Laboratory

Medical Skills Laboratory

Meslek Yüksekokulu

Related

Program

It is a care skills laboratory (physical examination, health assessment, care practices, etc.) organized for the students of our university SHMYO and mainly Nursing Department to practice the theoretical trainings they have seen in the courses since the 1st grade. The development of care skills through one-to-one practice on models and various laboratory materials in the laboratory environment is of great importance in terms of the quality of education. At the end of each course that requires practice and skills, the relevant applications are carried out in this laboratory in accordance with the content of the vocational courses in the presence of expert lecturers in order to contribute to their knowledge before clinical practice.

This laboratory is used by the departments listed below.

Nursing Department

Midwifery Department
